official_name: SEMI - Semiconductor Equipment and Materials International
notes: Global semiconductor industry association. Publishes SEMI standards covering semiconductor equipment, materials, and increasingly fab cybersecurity (SEMI E187 - Specification for Cybersecurity of Fab Equipment). Paid.

match_nodes.description: SEMI E187 — Cybersecurity of Fab Equipment

data.official_name: SEMI E187 - Specification for Cybersecurity of Fab Equipment
data.notes: Paid. The dominant cybersecurity specification for semiconductor manufacturing equipment. Aligned with NIST CSF and IEC 62443.
